text.message: Don't think we should be cutting deals with blue imo
They will pop us to death on that spot
just hold the 10 down and hope i guess
Insane how much brick they were able to accumulate to get there
yeah feeding a city there was not the move
would match if i could man sorry
dang thats enough wheat to feed families
were all starving out here lol
i think we feed green road
Well then maybe you should have thought twice before plugging me and red's 8 wheat lol
where do you think i should have blocked
me n blue share like everything is the issue
still a close game all around
i guess if you feed them they will
